Alhamdulillah perjalanan ibadah Umroh be: Alhamdulillah, the Umrah pilgrimage with Haramain Tour was incredibly comfortable. The Muthawif was very helpful, the hotel was close, and the food suited Indonesian tastes very well. Thank you for facilitating our family's worship.
Pendaftaran sangat mudah, transparan, da: Registration was very easy, transparent, and with no hidden fees. From manasik preparation, departure, to returning to the homeland, the service remained consistent. InsyaAllah, I will trust my Hajj savings here as well.
Very grateful to have chosen Haramain Tour. Guidance from the beginning of manasik to tawaf wada was very solemn. The tour leader was responsive when pilgrims had confusion, and the culinary offerings always suited domestic tastes.
Fasilitas kereta cepat Haramain ke Madin: The Haramain high-speed train facility to Madinah was a total lifesaver! Especially when traveling with elderly parents. Overall, this pilgrimage journey was very energy-efficient, highly recommended!
